name: claude-mem
description: Persistent memory across Codex and Claude Code sessions. Automatically captures tool usage, generates summaries, and provides relevant context.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory shared with Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Automatically captures every tool call and user prompt, generates AI-powered summaries, and injects relevant context from past sessions. Memory is shared between Codex CLI and Claude Code. Includes Windows-safe cold start with fail-closed strategy.
